title: HandMade Connections CC - Leading digital innovation in George
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Being nominated for Best of...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Being nominated for Best of George is a tremendous honour for the team at HandMade Connections CC.


> This recognition celebrates the strong client relationships we’ve built through our passion for helping local businesses grow, our innovative spirit, and our commitment to excellence.


We are a premium web design and digital marketing agency, rooted in the heart of the Garden Route, but with an international presence.

With over 30 years of industry experience, we have built a reputation for delivering customised, impactful solutions that help businesses thrive in today’s digital world.

Our offerings range from bespoke website design and development to advanced database solutions, professional hosting, search engine optimisation, and targeted digital marketing strategies.What sets HandMade Connections CC apart?

- We are the first hosting company in the Southern Cape, with a proven track record for reliable, professional server hosting.
- Our approach is personal, hands-on and results-driven - solutions for every client are designed to meet their unique needs.
- Our portfolio includes successful partnerships with renowned businesses such as Prepaid24, George Business Chamber, AHI Western Cape, Sotheby’s, and many more, highlighting our versatility and expertise across industries.
- Our team’s deep industry knowledge and comprehensive range of IT services make us a true one-stop-shop for digital solutions.

The people of George are our people. Being rooted in George, it is always special for HandMade Connections to work with the residents.

Winning this award would be a meaningful recognition from our local community of our team's dedication and a celebration of our 30 years of service to the George community. Vote for us at https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
